entry.title: 2026 Chevrolet Traverse AWD LT
entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Chevrolet Columbus is a family-owned Chevrolet dealership at 800 Maple Ave in Columbus, Wisconsin, serving drivers across Columbia County and the greater Madison area - including Beaver Dam, Sun Prairie, Waterloo, Watertown, and Portage. This 2026 Chevrolet Traverse AWD LT is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Chevrolet Traverse AWD LT is finished in MOSAIC BLACK METALLIC and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera with washer - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. Even if there are sloppy conditions, the washer keeps the camera's view clean. Rear camera with washer is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: Want more detail on this Traverse, its pricing, or current Chevrolet offers? Reach out to Napleton Columbus Chevrolet and we'll walk you through financing and trade-in options. Napleton Columbus Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout south-central Wisconsin and the greater Madison area. Give us a call at 920-212-8238 or stop by to test drive your new car, truck, or SUV today! 800 Maple Ave Columbus WI 53925 Napleton Chevrolet Columbus Online Pricing Disclaimer New vehicle inventory is offered for sale at the Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP), as set by General Motors and/or General Motors Financial. Prices labeled as the "Napleton Price" include all eligible dealer discounts and/or manufacturer incentives and do not include taxes, title, license fees, documentation fees, optional equipment, or dealer-installed accessories selected by the customer at the time of purchase. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in the displayed pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice based on manufacturer program updates, incentive eligibility, or market conditions. Napleton Chevrolet Columbus advertises its inventory on this website, [www.napletonchevycolumbus.com](https://www.napletonchevycolumbus.com), as well as on third-party advertising platforms. Pricing is specific to each vehicle, identified by its Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) and dealer stock number. The pricing shown on [www.napletonchevycolumbus.com](https://www.napletonchevycolumbus.com) represents the most current and accurate pricing for Napleton Chevrolet Columbus. In the event of any discrepancy between this website and any third-party website, the pricing displayed on [www.napletonchevycolumbus.com](https://www.napletonchevycolumbus.com) will be considered the most accurate and will supersede all other advertised prices. While every effort is made to ensure the accuracy of the information on this site, errors may occur. Please verify all information with a Napleton Chevrolet Columbus Client Advisor. You may do so by contacting us directly or visiting the dealership.

entry.title: 2026 Chevrolet Trailblazer LS
entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Chevrolet Columbus is a family-owned Chevrolet dealership at 800 Maple Ave in Columbus, Wisconsin, serving drivers across Columbia County and the greater Madison area - including Beaver Dam, Sun Prairie, Waterloo, Watertown, and Portage. This 2026 Chevrolet Trailblazer LS is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Chevrolet Trailblazer LS is finished in Sterling Gray Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

LS Convenience Package ($495 value)

  • Rear Windows and Liftgate Deep-Tinted Glass
  • Remote Start

Preferred Equipment Group 1LS

    LS Confidence Package ($395 value)

    • Rear Park Assist
    • Rear Cross Traffic Alert
    • Lane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone Alert

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: ENGINE, ECOTEC 1.3L I3 TURBO DOHC SIDI WITH VARIABLE VALVE TIMING (VVT), STERLING GRAY METALLIC Want more detail on this Trailblazer, its pricing, or current Chevrolet offers? Reach out to Napleton Columbus Chevrolet and we'll walk you through financing and trade-in options. Napleton Columbus Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities throughout south-central Wisconsin and the greater Madison area. entry.title: 2026 Chevrolet Trailblazer LT
entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Chevrolet Columbus is a family-owned Chevrolet dealership at 800 Maple Ave in Columbus, Wisconsin, serving drivers across Columbia County and the greater Madison area - including Beaver Dam, Sun Prairie, Waterloo, Watertown, and Portage. This 2026 Chevrolet Trailblazer LT is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Chevrolet Trailblazer LT is finished in Sterling Gray Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE, ECOTEC 1.3L I3 TURBO DOHC SIDI WITH VARIABLE VALVE TIMING (VVT), STERLING GRAY METALLIC Want more detail on this Trailblazer, its pricing, or current Chevrolet offers? entry.title: 2023 Chrysler Pacifica Limited
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2023 Chrysler Pacifica Limited offered in Bright White Clearcoat will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Quick Order Package 27P

    Comfort

    • Ventilated front seats -That's cool. Ventilated front seats provides targeted cool air so you and your passenger can get comfortable quicker in hot weather. Getting comfortable is no sweat when you have ventilated front seats.
    • Manual fold into floor second-row seat - Room to move! When you need the extra space for cargo rather than kids, you'll love the manual fold-into-floor second row seats. Just pull the release and manual fold into floor second-row seats disappear for more room in the back, without hurting your back.

    Convenience

    • Power open and close liftgate - On-demand access. When your arms are full of cargo, the last thing you want to do is set it all down just to open the liftgate, then pick it all back up to load it in. By remotely opening and closing, power liftgate lets you skip straight to the loading. It also eliminates the awkward stretch to reach up for the liftgate to close it. Load and go with power open and close liftgate.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.

This 2026 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 LT Trail Boss is finished in Black and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 2LT

  • SiriusXM with 360L Trial Subscription

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Preferred Equipment Group 1RS

    Floor Liner Package ($275 value)

    • 1st and 2nd Row All-Weather Floor Liners
    • 3rd Row All-Weather Floor Liner

    Convenience

    • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Hands-off cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now with hands-off cruise control simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles with minimal steering input from you. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-off cruise control.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. One Owner! This 2024 GMC Terrain SLT offered in Sterling Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 4SA

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Wireless Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

      • Includes Class II trailer receiver hitch, wiring harness with 4-pin connector, trailer sway mitigation, and full size spare wheel.

      Safety and Security

      • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
      • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
      • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

      Technology and Telematics

      • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
      • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

entry.title: 2027 Chevrolet Bolt RS
entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Chevrolet Columbus is a family-owned Chevrolet dealership at 800 Maple Ave in Columbus, Wisconsin, serving drivers across Columbia County and the greater Madison area - including Beaver Dam, Sun Prairie, Waterloo, Watertown, and Portage. This 2027 Chevrolet Bolt RS is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2027 Chevrolet Bolt RS is finished in Sterling Grey Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: STERLING GREY METALLIC Want more detail on this Bolt, its pricing, or current Chevrolet offers? Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2017 Cadillac XT5 Premium Luxury FWD offered in Stellar Black Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 1SE

  • Automatic Dual Zone Climate Control

  • 170 Amp Alternator

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

  • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.

entry.title: 2026 Chevrolet Equinox AWD LT
entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Chevrolet Columbus is a family-owned Chevrolet dealership at 800 Maple Ave in Columbus, Wisconsin, serving drivers across Columbia County and the greater Madison area - including Beaver Dam, Sun Prairie, Waterloo, Watertown, and Portage. This 2026 Chevrolet Equinox AWD LT is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Chevrolet Equinox AWD LT is finished in Lakeshore Blue Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Convenience Package II ($2,050 value)

  • Driver 8-Way Power Seat Adjuster
  • 2-Way Power Driver Lumbar Control Seat Adjuster
  • Cabin Humidity and Windshield Sensor
  • Intermittent Front Rain-Sensing Wipers
  • Dual-Zone Automatic Climate Control
  • Heated Wiper Park
  • Wireless Phone Charging For Portable Devices
  • Evotex Seat Trim
  • Autosense Hands-Free Programmable Power Liftgate
  • Programmable Universal Home Remote
  • Overhead Sunglass Storage

Preferred Equipment Group 2LT

    Safety and Security

    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, 1.5L TURBO DOHC 4-CYLINDER, SIDI, VVT, TRANSMISSION, 8-SPEED AUTOMATIC, AXLE, 3.47 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, WHEELS, 17" (43.2 CM) GRAZEN METALLIC MACHINED-FACE ALUMINUM, TIRES, 235/65R17, ALL-SEASON BLACKWALL, LAKESHORE BLUE METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, BLACK, EVOTEX SEAT TRIM, CONVENIENCE PACKAGE II, LPO, FRONT AND REAR SPLASH GUARDS, CUSTOM MOLDED, WIPERS, FRONT RAIN-SENSING, INTERMITTENT, HEATED WIPER PARK, LICENSE PLATE FRONT MOUNTING PACKAGE, LIFTGATE, AUTOSENSE, HANDS-FREE POWER PROGRAMMABLE, SEAT ADJUSTER, DRIVER 8-WAY POWER, SEAT ADJUSTER, 2-WAY POWER DRIVER LUMBAR CONTROL, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINERS, LPO, SECOND ROW ALL-WEATHER MAT, UNIVERSAL HOME REMOTE, WIRELESS PHONE CHARGING, FOR PORTABLE DEVICES, AIR CONDITIONING, DUAL-ZONE AUTOMATIC CLIMATE CONTROL, SENSOR, CABIN HUMIDITY AND WINDSHIELD TEMPERATURE, SUNGLASS STORAGE, OVERHEAD Want more detail on this Equinox, its pricing, or current Chevrolet offers? entry.title: 2021 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 LT
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2021 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 LT offered in Oxford Brown Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Dark Essentials Package ($445 value)

  • Black Name Plates
  • Black Tailgate CHEVROLET Lettering
  • Front Black Bowtie Emblem

Z71 Off-Road and Protection Package ($1,595 value)

  • All-Weather Floor Liner

Z71 Off-Road Package

  • 18" X 8.5" Bright Silver Painted Aluminum Wheels
  • 2-Speed Transfer Case
  • 265/65R18SL AT BW Tires
  • Dual Exhaust with Polished Outlets
  • Heavy-Duty Air Filter
  • Hill Descent Control
  • Off-Road Suspension
  • Skid Plates

Bed Protection Package

  • Chevytec Spray-On Black Bedliner
  • Rear Wheelhouse Liners

Safety and Security

  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Technology and Telematics

  • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, 5.3L ECOTEC3 V8, TRANSMISSION, 8-SPEED AUTOMATIC, ELECTRONICALLY CONTROLLED, GVWR, 7100 LBS. (3221 KG), REAR AXLE, 3.23 RATIO, WHEELS, 18" X 8.5" (45.7 CM X 21.6 CM) BRIGHT SILVER PAINTED ALUMINUM, TIRES, 265/65R18SL ALL-TERRAIN, WHITE OUTLINED LETTER, TIRE, SPARE 265/70R17SL ALL-SEASON, BLACKWALL, OXFORD BROWN METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT 40/20/40 SPLIT-BENCH, JET BLACK, CLOTH SEAT TRIM, AUDIO SYSTEM, CHEVROLET INFOTAINMENT 3 SYSTEM, Z71 OFF-ROAD AND PROTECTION PACKAGE, Z71 OFF-ROAD PACKAGE, BED PROTECTION PACKAGE, LPO, DARK ESSENTIALS PACKAGE, HILL DESCENT CONTROL, TRANSFER CASE, TWO-SPEED, COOLING, EXTERNAL ENGINE OIL COOLER, COOLING, AUXILIARY EXTERNAL TRANSMISSION OIL COOLER, AIR FILTER, HEAVY-DUTY, ALTERNATOR, 170 AMPS, TRAILER BRAKE CONTROLLER, INTEGRATED, SKID PLATES, EXHAUST, DUAL WITH POLISHED OUTLETS, CHEVYTEC SPRAY-ON BEDLINER, BLACK WITH CHEVROLET LOGO, LPO, BLACK BOWTIE EMBLEM, FRONT, LPO, BLACK NAMEPLATES, LPO, BLACK TAILGATE LETTERING, WHEELHOUSE LINERS, REAR, LPO, MOLDED SPLASH GUARDS, BLACK, LICENSE PLATE KIT, FRONT, SEATING, HEATED DRIVER AND FRONT OUTBOARD PASSENGER, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINERS, 1ST AND 2ND ROWS, REMOTE VEHICLE STARTER SYSTEM, THEFT-DETERRENT SYSTEM, UNAUTHORIZED ENTRY, DEFOGGER, REAR-WINDOW ELECTRIC Napleton Columbus Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 920-212-8238 or stop by to test drive or inquire about your new car or truck today! 800 Maple Ave Columbus WI 53925 Napleton Autos Online Pricing Disclaimer Certified Pre-Owned and used inventory is offered for sale to the public. Pricing indicated as "The Napleton Price" includes all applicable dealer discounts and/or manufacturer's incentives, and does not include any tax, title, doc fee, license, optional equipment costs and/or dealer installed add-on items selected by the customer at the time of sale. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice. entry.title: 2025 Honda HR-V Sport
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2025 Honda HR-V Sport offered in Urban Gray Pearl will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.

          Convenience

          • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

          Safety and Security

          • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
          • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

          • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.

Convenience

  • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.
  • Keyfob engine start control - Get an early start. Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, thanks to Keyfob engine start control.

Safety and Security

  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Technology and Telematics

    • Smart device and keyfob engine start control - Phone ahead. Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob or your smart device, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2024 Cadillac CT4 Premium Luxury offered in Argent Silver Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Climate Package ($1,200 value)

  • Driver 4-Way Power Lumbar Seat Adjuster
  • Front Passenger 4-Way Power Lumbar Seat Adjuster
  • Heated Driver and Front Passenger Seats
  • Heated Steering Wheel
  • Ventilated Driver and Front Passenger Seats

Preferred Equipment Group 1SD

  • 2.0L Turbo 4-Cylinder SIDI Engine
  • 8-Speed Automatic Transmission
  • Driver 2-Way Power Lumbar Seat Adjuster
  • Dual Digital Driver Information Center Display
  • Front Passenger 2-Way Power Lumbar Seat Adjuster
  • HD Rear Vision Camera
  • Leather-Wrapped Steering Wheel
  • LED Reflective Windshield Collision Alert
  • Steering Wheel Mounted Paddle Shift Controls

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

entry.title: 2027 Chevrolet Equinox AWD LT
entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Chevrolet Columbus is a family-owned Chevrolet dealership at 800 Maple Ave in Columbus, Wisconsin, serving drivers across Columbia County and the greater Madison area - including Beaver Dam, Sun Prairie, Waterloo, Watertown, and Portage. This 2027 Chevrolet Equinox AWD LT is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2027 Chevrolet Equinox AWD LT is finished in Sterling Gray Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE, 1.5L TURBO DOHC 4-CYLINDER, SIDI, VVT, STERLING GRAY METALLIC Want more detail on this Equinox, its pricing, or current Chevrolet offers? entry.title: 2025 Hyundai Sonata Hybrid SEL
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2025 Hyundai Sonata Hybrid SEL offered in Portofino Gray will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Option Group 01

    Convenience

    • Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead. It's stop/go feature automatically brings the vehicle to a stop if traffic stops and resumes distance pacing cruise when traffic starts to move again. Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go; your ultimate co-pilot.

    Safety and Security

    • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Apple CarPlay & Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    Other notable features: OPTION GROUP 01, PORTOFINO GRAY, BLACK, CLOTH SEATING SURFACES Napleton Columbus Chevrolet is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. This 2013 Ford Escape SEL offered in Sterling Gray Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Equipment Group 302A ($2,360 value)

    Convenience

    • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.
    • Power open and close liftgate - On-demand access. When your arms are full of cargo, the last thing you want to do is set it all down just to open the liftgate, then pick it all back up to load it in. By remotely opening and closing, power liftgate lets you skip straight to the loading. It also eliminates the awkward stretch to reach up for the liftgate to close it. Load and go with power open and close liftgate.
    • Keyfob engine start control - Get an early start. Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, thanks to Keyfob engine start control.

    Safety and Security

    • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Napleton Auto Group utilizes this website, as well as 3rd party websites, to market and advertise our inventory online. All pricing is subject to the availability of that exact vehicle, as indicated by the Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) and dealer stock number. The pricing reflected on this website, www.napleton.autos, represents the most current and accurate pricing for Napleton Auto Group. In the event of a discrepancy in pricing between this website and any 3rd party website, this website will be considered the most current and accurate price and supersedes any and all other advertised prices. While great effort is made to ensure the accuracy of the information on this site, errors do occur, so please verify all information with a Napleton Auto Group Client Advisor.
